zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord John Woodward於1477年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾厄普頓時，他的父親Lord George Woodward27歲，母親Bridgett Upton19歲。他於1498年與Marjorie Collingridge在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1566年7月8日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾厄普頓享年89歲。

nameMeanings.name: Woodward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a forester employed to look after the trees and game in a forest, Middle English woodward (from Old English wudu ‘wood’ + weard ‘guardian, protector’).

History: Henry Woodward emigrated from England in 1635 and settled first in Dorchester, MA, and subsequently in Northampton, MA. He had many prominent descendants. Another Henry Woodward, born c. 1646 in the British West Indies, was the first English settler in SC (1664).

variants.name: Woodard
meanings: from the Norman Old French personal name Odard, Udard, Middle English Wodard, Wudard. It derives from the ancient Germanic name Authard, Othard, Odard, composed of the elements aud- ‘riches' + hard- ‘hard, bold’.
occupational name from Middle English wode ‘wood’ + herde ‘herd’ (Old English wudu + hierde), for a person who tended animals pastured in woodland.

variants.name: Woodworth
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of Woodward or Wadworth, the latter being a habitational name from Wadworth in Yorkshire, which is derived from the Old English personal name Wada, Wadda + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.

variants.name: Woodman
meanings: occupational name for a woodcutter or a forester (compare Woodward ), from Middle English wodeman ‘woodman’. In some instances this may be a variant of Wadman .
from the Middle English personal name Wudemann (Old English Wuduman, from wudu ‘wood’ + mann ‘man’).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord John Woodward was born in 1477, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, Lord George Woodward, was 27 and his mother, Bridgett Upton, was 19. He married Marjorie Collingridge in 1498, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 8 July 1566, in Upton, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

Il est décédé le 8 juillet 1566, à Upton, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord John Woodwardが1477年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで生まれた時，父Lord George Woodwardは27歳，母Bridgett Uptonは19歳であった。1498年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンでMarjorie Collingridgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1566年7月8日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウプトンで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord John Woodward(이)가 1477년 영국 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord George Woodward(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Bridgett Upton(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1498년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 Marjorie Collingridge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1566년 7월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 업턴에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord John Woodward родился в 1477 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Lord George Woodward было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Bridgett Upton, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Marjorie Collingridge в 1498 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 июля 1566 г. в местности уптон, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.
